scrapegraphai.purpose: structured web and local document extraction

gemma.purpose: local reasoning, coding, and agentic model profile

rank_bm25.purpose: keyword retrieval for Hybrid RAG and corrective retrieval checks

networkx.purpose: local relationship graph for GraphRAG-style project, tool, and dependency maps

sentence_transformers.purpose: local embeddings for semantic search, multimodal RAG experiments, and memory retrieval

localsend.purpose: local network file transfer between project devices without cloud storage

foam_markdown_vault.purpose: fully free/open Markdown knowledge vault source for notes, project memory, and learning maps

local_repo_prompt_exporter.purpose: free local GitReverse-style repo architecture summarizer that turns selected project files into AI-readable context

homebrew.purpose: free/open package manager for macOS/Linux developer setup scripts
homebrew.not_for: Windows-first setup; use winget or direct installers on Windows.

git_cli_safety_workflow.purpose: safe Git undo, revert, restore, branch, and status workflow for every project
git_cli_safety_workflow.license: Git is GPL-2.0-only; workflow is Kattappa-built local guidance

github_desktop.purpose: free/open-source visual Git client for safer commits, diffs, branch checks, and beginner-friendly reversions

qwebbridge.purpose: open-source self-hosted browser bridge for local AI agents; Kimi WebBridge-compatible without depending on Kimi Desktop
guardrails: approval required before form submission, purchases, account changes, or sensitive data entry

gemma4_12b.purpose: local multimodal model profile for reasoning, coding help, image/audio understanding, captions, and private project assistants
gemma4_12b.provider: Ollama, Transformers, LiteRT-LM, or Google AI Edge Gallery
gemma4_12b.hardware_note: 12B-class multimodal local model; use smaller Gemma 4 variants on weak devices.

open_source_alternative_directories.purpose: find free/open-source replacements before adopting SaaS tools into the project stack
open_source_alternative_directories.license: public web directories; verify each listed project's own license

hugging_face_papers.purpose: free AI paper and model discovery source for research, model selection, and project learning
hugging_face_papers.license: public research index; verify paper/model licenses before reuse

benchlm.purpose: free benchmark and price-performance reference for choosing local/open models before installing or routing
benchlm.license: public benchmark directory; not a runtime dependency

deepseek_r1_local.purpose: local reasoning and coding model profile for Second Brain, GOAT-style planning, and agent review without paid API dependency
deepseek_r1_local.provider: Ollama, llama.cpp, vLLM, or Transformers using open-weight DeepSeek R1/distill models
deepseek_r1_local.license: MIT for DeepSeek-R1 code/models per official release; verify chosen checkpoint license before install
guardrails: do not send private project data to DeepSeek API
route through existing model approval/profile controls

chromadb.purpose: local vector database for Second Brain, project memory, RAG evaluation datasets, and NeuroSeed study memory

local_eval_harness.purpose: fully local retrieval, generation, end-to-end, and production regression evaluation without SaaS eval platforms

ragas_or_deepeval_local.purpose: optional open-source evaluation libraries for RAG quality checks when local eval metrics need more depth
ragas_or_deepeval_local.license: verify package license before pinning; keep as optional replaceable adapter

mermaid.purpose: free diagram-as-code replacement for Napkin AI, Graphify/Grafyfy-style visuals, architecture maps, PCB workflows, and project docs

excalidraw.purpose: free/open visual sketching replacement for Napkin AI-style concept boards and system diagrams

argos_translate.purpose: offline text translation for Universal Translator and Indian-language experiments without Sarvam/BHASHINI paid API dependency
argos_translate.license: MIT/open-source package ecosystem; verify language package license before bundling

vosk.purpose: offline speech-to-text option for Universal Translator and Kattappa voice commands on weak machines
vosk.license: Apache-2.0 toolkit; verify model license before bundling

faster_whisper.purpose: local speech-to-text for voice commands, meeting notes, Universal Translator, and BHASHINI/Sarvam STT replacement

piper_tts.purpose: local neural text-to-speech for Kattappa voice responses and Universal Translator output without Bulbul/Sarvam paid TTS dependency

openwakeword.purpose: offline wake-word engine for Kattappa, Mama, Kittu, and Universal Translator hands-free mode

opencode_local_coding_loop.purpose: free local Claude Code/EEC-style coding workflow: inspect repo, plan, patch, test, and summarize with approval gates
opencode_local_coding_loop.license: Kattappa-built local workflow using Git, local models, and existing file tools

qiskit.purpose: free quantum computing SDK for Kaveri/QpiAI-inspired learning labs and future quantum-safe demos

local_b2b_playbook.purpose: local product strategy templates for B2B master-stroke, AI-employee workflow design, and production-readiness scoring

local_sovereign_frugal_ai_patterns.purpose: architecture rules for sovereign, frugal, offline-first, combat-tested-by-evaluation systems without hype claims

airllm.purpose: experiment with large models on smaller VRAM at lower speed

firecrawl.purpose: web extraction API or self-hosted crawler fallback for research workflows

node_red.purpose: fully free/open workflow automation layer for local event-driven project tasks with approval gates

kronos_finance.purpose: OHLCV/K-line financial forecasting reference model for Finance Brain

cosmos3.purpose: NVIDIA open physical-AI world model reference for robotics, video reasoning, synthetic data, and sensor-action research
cosmos3.license: OpenMDW-1.1 model distribution; inspect current model cards before use
cosmos3.hardware_note: heavy GPU/cloud requirement; keep out of default laptop runtime

exo_local_ai_cluster.purpose: pool multiple local Macs/workstations into one AI inference cluster with standard APIs
exo_local_ai_cluster.best_for: running larger local models across multiple trusted machines

ray_local_cluster.purpose: free/open distributed Python runtime for agent jobs, indexing, data processing, simulation, and background workers across machines
ray_local_cluster.best_for: splitting Universal AI worker tasks across trusted local systems
guardrails: do not expose Ray dashboard or job APIs to the public internet
approval required before remote command execution

google_ai_edge_gallery.purpose: on-device AI sandbox for trying Gemma/open models, mobile multimodal tasks, local speech, and hardware benchmarks
google_ai_edge_gallery.run_mode: local Android/iOS/macOS app after model download
google_ai_edge_gallery.best_for: Universal AI mobile/edge experiments, Universal Translator offline demos, NeuroSeed consent-first local study assistant demos

litert_lm.purpose: Google AI Edge local LLM runtime for optimized on-device inference
litert_lm.license: Google AI Edge/LiteRT tooling; verify current package license before embedding
litert_lm.best_for: future Android/mobile local inference inside Universal Translator, DEWS field assistant, and NeuroSeed offline prototypes

openrouter_free_models.purpose: cloud fallback for model experiments using only models explicitly marked free
guardrails: disabled by default unless the user supplies an API key and approves cloud routing

google_ai_studio.purpose: cloud Gemini API prototyping only, not a local core dependency

bhashini_research_only.purpose: Indian-language public-program reference for language coverage ideas; not a default runtime dependency
guardrails: do not send private audio/text by default

sarvam_free_llm_reference.purpose: reference Indian AI APIs and free chat model availability, but keep paid STT/TTS/translation out of core
guardrails: paid speech/translation endpoints blocked from core

learning_sources.build_your_own_x: systems-building practice for Universal AI and project tooling
learning_sources.system_design_primer: reference for scalable app, messaging, storage, and marketplace architectures
learning_sources.the_book_of_secret_knowledge: defensive Linux, networking, and security learning source
learning_sources.free_programming_books: free CS, embedded, and software learning library
learning_sources.git_reverse_prompting_pattern: learn the idea of summarizing repo architecture into prompts, then implement locally without external services
learning_sources.hugging_face_papers: free AI paper/model discovery for learning and model selection
learning_sources.benchlm: public model benchmark comparison source for choosing free/local models
learning_sources.open_source_alternative_directories: free/open-source alternative discovery before adopting any paid SaaS idea
learning_sources.terafab: track as manufacturing/AI-infrastructure inspiration only; do not add unless a fully free/open local tool is identified
learning_sources.codegraph_pattern: turn codebase relationships into local graphs using NetworkX plus repo indexing
learning_sources.everything_claude_code_pattern: learn coding-agent workflow patterns, then implement locally with opencode_local_coding_loop and no Claude dependency
learning_sources.odysseus_repo_review_pattern: inspect GitHub repo license before reuse; if unclear, rebuild the useful idea locally
learning_sources.cli_anything_pattern: use one local CLI entrypoint per project with approval gates and no hidden installers
learning_sources.second_brain_goat_pattern: SQLite + ChromaDB + local embeddings + DeepSeek/Gemma model profiles for private long-term memory

piezoelectric_sensors.purpose: pressure, vibration, ultrasonic, and low-power sensing experiments
piezoelectric_sensors.not_for: Do not treat tiny piezo harvesters as a power source for AI hardware.

physical_ai_world_models.purpose: future camera, video, simulation, and action reasoning for real-world systems
physical_ai_world_models.not_for: Do not require datacenter-scale models for default local runs.

quantum_india_learning.purpose: Kaveri/QpiAI-inspired quantum learning and simulation experiments using free SDKs first
quantum_india_learning.not_for: Do not claim quantum advantage or require paid quantum cloud access in core projects.

architecture_patterns_from_pdf.hybrid_rag: combine vector search and BM25 before answer generation
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.graph_rag: extract entities and relationships for project/tool dependency maps
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.agentic_rag: planner chooses vector search, web research, database, finance, or desktop tools
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.corrective_rag: grade retrieved context, rewrite the query, and fall back before answering
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.multimodal_rag: future path for screenshots, PCB images, tables, documents, and OCR
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.agent_loop: purpose, prompt, model, tools, memory, orchestration, UI, tests
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.automation_system: research, content, analytics, support, automation, and workflow agents
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.hardware_awareness: CPU, GPU, TPU, NPU, LPU, and DPU concepts inform local setup guidance
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.ccna_networking: OSI/TCP-IP, ports, DNS, DHCP, NAT, VLAN, routing, switching, and safe network troubleshooting basics
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.retrieval_evaluation: measure whether retrieved context contains the answer source before generation
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.generation_evaluation: score factuality, format, safety, and project-policy compliance locally
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.end_to_end_evaluation: test complete user workflow from command to final artifact
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.production_evaluation: run regression, readiness, cross-platform, and privacy checks before release
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.sovereign_ai: local-first, user-owned data, replaceable models, no required cloud dependency
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.frugal_ai: prefer smaller local models, caching, fallback templates, and low-cost hardware-aware routing
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.combat_proven_ai: translate the phrase into evidence-based stress tests, incident drills, and failure logs, not marketing claims
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.ai_employees_are_here: represent as role-based specialist workers with approvals, not uncontrolled autonomous accounts
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.voice_ai_explosion: prioritize offline wake-word, STT, VAD, TTS, and latency instrumentation
architecture_patterns_from_pdf.b2b_master_stroke: build private, auditable workflows first; only later package as customer-safe deployments

paid_tool_replacement_policy.rule: When a user mentions a paid, freemium, trial-limited, reward-network, closed, or restricted tool, search for a fully free/open-source/local-first alternative before adding anything to the seven projects.
decision_order: 1. Verify whether the named tool is fully free enough for project use.
2. If it is paid, freemium, trial-limited, reward-based, closed, or privacy-risky, block it from core project mappings.
3. Search for a similar free/open/local replacement.
4. Add the replacement only if it improves at least one of the seven projects.
5. Keep external installs, downloads, remote execution, and account connections approval-gated.

ecosystem_topic_audit_from_chat.policy: Add only fully free/open/local items to project mappings. Paid, freemium, cloud-metered, unknown-license, or closed tools are blocked from core and replaced with local/free equivalents.
